member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ImagesController.CreateImageAsync(ProductManagement.Contracts.Dtos.ImageForCreateDto)
member.response: All Gucci (if the image is successfully created)

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ImagesController.GetImageForDisplay(System.Int32)
member.returns: The image you've been searching for all your life.
member.response: All Gucci (if the image has been found)
If the image was not found.

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProduct(System.Int32)
member.returns: The product you're searching for lol.
member.response: All Gucci (returns the product if found)
If the product is not found

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ProductsController.GetProducts
member.response: All Gucci (if any product is found)

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ProductsController.Create(ProductManagement.Contracts.Dtos.ProductForCreateOrUpdateDto)
member.response: All Gucci (if the product is successfully created)

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ProductsController.Update(System.Int32,ProductManagement.Contracts.Dtos.ProductForCreateOrUpdateDto)
member.returns: The updated version of this product
member.response: All Gucci (if the product is successfully updated)
If the product you're trying to update does not exist.

member.name: M:ProductManagement.API.Controllers.ProductsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.response: All Gucci (if the item is successfully deleted)
If the object you're trying to delete does not exist.
